title: carex calcicola
intro: Carex calcicola, also known as calcicole sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat various kidney and urinary issues. Carex calcicola is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
